metadata.description: The Gateway Corp's vetted Claude Code marketplace: the core method plugin plus the governed tool catalog. Stack-specific skills are cherry-picked into repos via the catalog, not shipped as always-on plugins.

plugins.name: gateway-core
plugins.description: Org-wide super harness: size-routed workflows, persona-aware project interview, per-project harness bootstrap (claude-mem + codegraph/graphify + mgrep by default), subagent orchestration with review gates, systematic debugging, governed skill discovery, and verified completion.
